title: Little Class Graduation
subtitle: 水水宝宝班毕业啦
theme: 宝宝班毕业典礼和成长回顾
moral: 回顾这一年学会的事情、感谢老师和朋友，带着自豪与期待进入幼儿园小班。

pages.narration: 今天是重要的日子，美和园幼儿园宝宝班要举行毕业典礼啦。

scene_state.location: 美和园幼儿园操场入口

pages.composition_hint: eye-level wide view of Meiheyuan kindergarten playground entrance decorated for a graduation ceremony, colorful bunting and small flower decorations, rows of little yellow stools visible in the distance; shuishui stands excitedly in her usual pink dress and floral headband, all-animal kindergarten world, no humans

pages.narration: 这一年里，水水长大了。她已经会在学校自己吃饭。
pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium view in a bright kindergarten classroom dining area, shuishui sits on a small chair at a small table and eats by herself with a little spoon, tidy meal tray and soup bowl in front of her, several background animal classmates seated farther away, warm proud mood

pages.narration: 水水也会在学校午睡了。小床软软的，小被子香香的。
pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium view in a quiet kindergarten nap room with rows of small beds, shuishui sleeps peacefully in her own small bed under a little blanket, a kind giant panda teacher stands nearby checking quietly, soft daylight through curtains, calm warm mood

pages.narration: 这一年里，水水还和爸爸一起做了好多亲子活动。
pages.composition_hint: a clean four-panel memory page with soft white borders, exactly four panels: top-left shuishui and red panda plant peanut seeds in a round bunny-shaped flowerpot; top-right shuishui and red panda shape orange clay into a small orange tabby cat; bottom-left shuishui and red panda make a paper-cutting craft with colorful paper and safe rounded scissors; bottom-right shuishui proudly shows a finished craft while red panda smiles; no extra panels

pages.narration: 水水还参加了唱歌比赛。她穿着蓝色鲨鱼服，唱得可认真啦。

scene_state.location: 幼儿园唱歌比赛小舞台

pages.composition_hint: eye-level wide view of a small kindergarten singing stage, shuishui is clearly a white rabbit wearing a blue shark costume over her usual character design, face visible, singing seriously; nearby small animal classmates wear a bunny costume and a chick costume, all singing together, cheerful stage decorations, no humans

pages.narration: 水水也交到了好朋友。毛毛西、果儿、十一，大家一起玩得可开心了。
pages.composition_hint: three-quarter medium view in a kindergarten play corner: shuishui plays happily with three named animal classmates, Maomaoxi is a small white kitten, Guoer is a small fawn/deer, Shiyi is a small bear cub, the four friends build blocks and look at picture books together, clear species differences, warm friendship mood

pages.narration: 毕业照时间到了。三位老师带着宝宝班全体同学来到操场上。
pages.composition_hint: eye-level wide view of a kindergarten playground graduation photo setup; a kind giant panda teacher, a Dalmatian dog teacher, and a giraffe teacher lead many small animal classmates onto the playground; little yellow stools and a graduation backdrop are ready, sunny cheerful ceremony mood, all animals no humans

pages.narration: 第一张毕业照，大家排好队。水水坐在第一排中间。
pages.composition_hint: front-facing wide view of a carefully arranged kindergarten graduation photo lineup with three rows: first row small animal classmates sit on little yellow stools and shuishui sits exactly in the center in her usual pink dress; every classmate wears their own everyday outfit, varied colors and styles, absolutely no matching school uniforms; include many different small animal classmates such as kitten, fawn, bear cub, fox, monkey, piglet, raccoon, small elephant, and calf; second row small animal classmates stand in a row; third row has the giant panda teacher, Dalmatian dog teacher, and giraffe teacher standing behind in natural teacher clothes; clear orderly photo formation, all animals no humans

pages.narration: 第二张照片，是一组同学一起摆出酷酷的姿势。
pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium group photo of several small animal classmates posing in cool playful stances on the playground, such as a bear cub, little fox, monkey, piglet, raccoon, small elephant, and calf; each classmate wears a different everyday outfit with varied colors, no matching uniforms, no formal academic clothing; graduation decorations behind them; no shuishui as the main subject, no teachers, all animals no humans

pages.narration: 第三张照片，是一组同学一起坐在操场上。水水坐在中间，开心地举起小手。
pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium group photo of small animal classmates sitting together on the playground turf in their own everyday clothes, varied colors and casual childlike outfits, absolutely no academic gowns and no mortarboard caps; shuishui sits in the center in her usual pink dress and happily raises both paws; classmates around her include varied animals such as kitten, fawn, bear cub, small elephant, calf, fox, and monkey, smiling brightly; no teachers, all-animal world

pages.narration: 最后，小朋友们一起拍了一张大合影。这一次，只有小朋友，没有老师。
pages.composition_hint: front-facing wide group photo of only small animal classmates, no teachers; shuishui sits in the center in her usual pink dress; classmates wear varied everyday outfits, no uniforms, no academic gowns, no mortarboard caps; include kitten, fawn, bear cub, fox, monkey, piglet, raccoon, small elephant, and calf; one handmade sign is held in front, and the sign text must be copied EXACTLY as: I ♥ 幼儿园. Do not add any extra Chinese characters before 幼儿园. Do not write 小动物园 or 动物园. all animals no humans

pages.narration: 接着，王老师给大家颁发幼儿园小班的录取通知书。
pages.composition_hint: three-quarter medium view on the playground ceremony area, a kind giant panda teacher wearing a casual everyday button-up shirt and simple teacher trousers, not a formal suit, gently hands an admission notice envelope to shuishui and lightly pats her head, shuishui receives it with both paws, graduation backdrop and small flowers behind them, warm proud moment

pages.narration: 这是水水的录取通知书，里面藏着一个新的开始。

scene_state.location: 录取通知书特写上下二分格

pages.composition_hint: a clean vertical two-panel close-up page, stacked top and bottom panels, not left-right split; no characters; top panel is an admission notice cover with ONLY this exact Chinese title text: 美和园幼儿园 录取通知书. bottom panel is the opened notice with ONLY this exact Chinese text: 欢迎水水小朋友，加入美和园幼儿园小班。 Copy the Chinese characters exactly. Do not add 小动物园, 动物园, or any extra animal-school wording. neat paper texture and small flower decorations

pages.narration: 欢乐的一天结束了。水水带着录取通知书回到家，迫不及待地讲起毕业典礼的故事。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 幼儿园录取我去小班啦！

pages.composition_hint: eye-level medium view in a cozy living room, shuishui holds the admission notice and excitedly performs the story of being accepted into the next kindergarten class, a taller white rabbit and a sheep sit on the sofa listening with warm smiles, evening home light
